name: Chicken with East-West Marinade
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup rice wine or dry sherry
1 cup chopped mixed fresh basil, cilantro and mint
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all marinade ingredients in a bowl.
2. Place the chicken in the marinade mixture and cover it completely.
3. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 8 hours.
4. Remove the chicken from the marinade and grill over medium heat for about 12 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
5. Baste the chicken with marinade occasionally while cooking.
6. Serve 4 portions.
